title: andropogon contortus subvar. secundus
intro: Andropogon contortus subvar. secundus, also known as the secondary or second variety of the Andropogon contortus plant, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Andropogon contortus subvar. secundus include relieving bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions from the leaves and roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
